CENTRAL POLICE STATION — OCCURRENCE BOOK EXTRACT
OB No. 47/25/06/24
Date: 25 June 2024
Time recorded: 0930 hrs

Reporting officer: Cpl. Otieno (Service No. 78421)
Officer-in-charge: IP Mwangi
Station: Central Police Station, Nairobi

Particulars:
At about 1410 hrs on 24 June 2024, six (6) suspects were brought to this
station from Parliament Road in connection with the disturbance at the
Finance Bill protests. The suspects were Brian Kamau (24, ID 32109876),
Faith Wanjiku (22, ID 33445566), Musa Hassan (23, ID 31998877), Cynthia
Akinyi (21, ID 34567890), Kevin Mutua (25, ID 32887766), and Aisha Mohammed
(20, ID 35112233).

The arresting officers were PC Kariuki and PC Njoroge. Charge entered:
unlawful assembly contrary to s.78 Penal Code; pending further enquiries
under the Public Order Act, Cap 56.

The advocate Wanjiku & Associates attended the station at 1700 hrs and was
denied access to the suspects on the instruction of the OCS. No bond was
processed at this station as at the time of this entry.

Signed: Cpl. Otieno
Counter-signed: IP Mwangi
